Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state, bs.applicability, up.applicability AS applicability_1 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade = 1 AND (bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" >= 0.001)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/167117b29bcfbfb769fb8baa71249213fbcfb8c63042025ed97f5a2973ce0887/2fe34089-24b1-4f18-9f95-ca80ccf8efe4/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
